name: TKO Group Holdings, Inc.
description: TKO Group Holdings, Inc. is a premium sports and entertainment company formed in 2023 through the merger of UFC and WWE. Headquartered in the United States, the company operates as a global leader in live events, media rights, and sports entertainment. Its portfolio includes world-renowned organizations such as UFC, the premier mixed martial arts promotion, and WWE, a global leader in professional wrestling. TKO leverages its massive reach and fan engagement to produce high-impact content and live experiences, solidifying its position as a dominant force in the modern sports and entertainment landscape.
